strengths: ~17 years of continuous professional software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Recent hands-on AI work at re:cinq: MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks demonstrate current technical relevance
Founding and sustaining GISCollective as an open-source geo-data platform shows entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (~14 months at re:cinq); no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale, no publications or recognized industry standing in AI
No evidence of director-level IC seniority: all titles are Senior/Staff SWE with no track record of strategic customer advisory, executive-level influence, or org-wide technical leadership
Cloud experience is narrow — AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is the only concrete cloud artifact; no deep cloud platform or architecture work evident across the full career
response.justification: This role requires a recognized AI strategist operating at director-level IC scope — advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud-AI product futures, and inspiring cross-org technical direction. Bogdan is a competent, versatile software engineer with a solid 17-year track record and an MIT CS degree, but his AI exposure is limited to roughly 14 months of agentic tooling work at a startup, with no demonstrated AI platform products, no publications or conference presence in AI, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no evidence of the enterprise advisory or thought-leadership activities the role demands. The gap between his current seniority profile (Staff/Senior SWE) and the director-level IC expectation is significant and not bridgeable by tenure alone.
